scripts.dev:services: concurrently -n auth,user,product,inventory,order,production,billing,notification,reporting "npm --prefix services/auth run dev -- --webpack" "npm --prefix services/user run dev -- --webpack" "npm --prefix services/product run dev -- --webpack" "npm --prefix services/inventory run dev -- --webpack" "npm --prefix services/order run dev -- --webpack" "npm --prefix services/production run dev -- --webpack" "npm --prefix services/billing run dev -- --webpack" "npm --prefix services/notification run dev -- --webpack" "npm --prefix services/reporting run dev -- --webpack"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n front,auth,user,product,inventory,order,production,billing,notification,reporting "npm run dev" "npm --prefix services/auth run dev -- --webpack" "npm --prefix services/user run dev -- --webpack" "npm --prefix services/product run dev -- --webpack" "npm --prefix services/inventory run dev -- --webpack" "npm --prefix services/order run dev -- --webpack" "npm --prefix services/production run dev -- --webpack" "npm --prefix services/billing run dev -- --webpack" "npm --prefix services/notification run dev -- --webpack" "npm --prefix services/reporting run dev -- --webpack"
scripts.dev:full: npm run dev:infra && npm run dev:all
